docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,675.00 FILED BY CHIN, MARTIN AS TO DEFENDANT PAING, YE SWAN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-22-2026 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
DECLARATION OF CHANGE OF ADDRESS FILED BY DEFENDANT PAING, YE SWAN
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-22-2026 - JUDGMENT.
STIPULATION TO ALLOW THE CASE TO BE HEARD BY A JUDGE PRO TEM. FILED BY CHIN, MARTIN PAING, YE SWAN

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CHIN, MARTIN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PAING, YE SWAN $1.00 PRINCIPAL, $100.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $101.00, PLAINTIFF CHIN PROVIDED DENTAL SERVICES TO DEFENDANT PAING, WHO PAID BY CREDIT CARD AND THEN REVOKED PAYMENT. THE CREDIT CARD COMPANY ULTIMATELY REINSTATED PAYMENT TO DR. CHIN AFTER THIS CASE WAS FILED. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JAN-22-2026 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JAN-22-2026 BY JUDGE PRO TEM FLEISIG. PLAINTIFF MARTIN CHIN IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT YE SWAN PAING IS PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID FLEISIG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT PAING, YE SWAN
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED DEC-09-2025, PERSONAL SERVICE, SERVICE FEE: $50.00 AS TO DEFENDANT PAING, YE SWAN
